additional_findings.placeholder_checkout_sha: 9/10 workflows pin `actions/checkout@df4cb1c069e1874edd31b4311f1884172cec0e10`. `df4cb1c...` is NOT a real commit on actions/checkout; the real v4 SHA is `11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683`, which IS the comment string. The pin and comment are swapped — mechanical fix: replace pin with `11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4`. Same audit finding as hwLedger-2nd and several other repos this week. (P0)
additional_findings.phenotypeActions_404_chain: ci.yml:25 (`validate-governance.yml@00000000...`) and release.yml:41 (`promote@00000000...`) reference `KooshaPari/phenotypeActions` with 40-zero placeholder SHAs. The repo does not expose these workflow paths. Both jobs will fail at the `uses:` step on first run. Maintainer should either (a) point to a real source, (b) inline the logic, or (c) delete the steps. (P0)
additional_findings.vitepress_deploy_decorative: vitepress-deploy.yml runs `actions/setup-node@v4` + `npx vitepress build docs` (via `if [ -f docs/package.json ]` else-branch) — but there is no `docs/package.json` and no `docs/.vitepress/config.ts`. The Pages artifact `docs/.vitepress/dist` will be empty/absent. Workflow has been green because the deploy-pages step accepts an empty artifact. (P0)
additional_findings.release_malformed_expr: release.yml:26 `outputs: version: $123steps.version.outputs.version125` — should be `${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}` (the `$123` and `125` suffixes look like a macro-expansion artifact where `${{` was eaten). Combined with no preceding `version` step in the `release` job, the `promote` job's `needs.release.outputs.version` will resolve to empty and `promote@promote` with `version: ` will fail. (P0)
additional_findings.duplicate_on_key_in_4_workflows: doc-links.yml:3+:12 and fr-coverage.yml:3+:12 both declare `on:` twice (first `on: workflow_dispatch:`, second bare `on: [push, pull_request]`). YAML allows duplicates; second wins. First is dead. scorecard.yml:8+:16 + release.yml:9+:17 do the same with `permissions:`. (P1)
additional_findings.worklog_category_files_missing: worklog.md:12-21 documents a 7-category worklog taxonomy (`worklogs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `DUPLICATION.md`, `DEPENDENCIES.md`, `INTEGRATION.md`, `PERFORMANCE.md`, `RESEARCH.md`, `GOVERNANCE.md`) but only `worklog.md` itself exists. Any future entry must choose one of 7 phantom files; 0/7 created. AGENTS.md:23 references `docs/worklogs/README.md` as the worklog surface but the README is the index, not the partitioned log. (P0)
additional_findings.duplicate_governance_files: CODEOWNERS + SECURITY.md + FUNDING.yml each exist at BOTH root AND .github/ with different content. GitHub only honors /.github/CODEOWNERS, /.github/SECURITY.md, /.github/FUNDING.yml. Root copies are non-canonical drift. (P1)
additional_findings.changelog_unreleased_empty: CHANGELOG.md:8 [Unreleased] section has 0 entries (no Added/Changed/Fixed/Security) across the 2026-05/06 fan-out (commits 759112d, 9ad2467, ffe6c6c, 35e7068, 7488fdc, plus 9 stale branches worth of work). (P1)
additional_findings.mise_tasks_empty: mise.toml:6 task blocks declared (`format`, `lint`, `test`, `build`, `audit`, `docs:build`) but none have a `run =` line. `mise run test` exits 0 with no work. CLAUDE.md:32-36 mandates commands that mise.toml is supposed to wrap. (P0)

actions_recommended.title: Sweep workflow hygiene: replace decorative placeholder checkout SHA in 9/10 workflows + delete or inline the 2 placeholder-SHA phenotypeActions calls + fix release.yml malformed `${{ }}` expression + delete the 4 duplicate `on:`/`permissions:` keys + extract the 7 phantom worklog category files
actions_recommended.detail: (a) In 9/10 workflows (ci/codeql/doc-links/fr-coverage/release/scorecard/secrets-scan/security-deep-scan/trufflehog) replace `actions/checkout@df4cb1c069e1874edd31b4311f1884172cec0e10 # v4@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.1.1` with `actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4`. vitepress-deploy.yml:12 stays at `@v4` (P1). (b) ci.yml:25 + release.yml:41 — `KooshaPari/phenotypeActions/...@00000000...` 404s. Either point to a real SHA, inline the validate/promote logic, or delete the steps. (c) release.yml:26 fix `$123steps.version.outputs.version125` → `${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}` and add a real `version` step (e.g., `git-cliff` per cliff.toml). (d) scorecard.yml:8+:16 / release.yml:9+:17 duplicate `permissions:` — keep the wider scope (release needs contents:write+packages:write, scorecard needs read-all); delete the narrower. doc-links.yml:3+:12 / fr-coverage.yml:3+:12 duplicate `on:` — keep the broader `on: [push, pull_request]`. (e) worklog.md:12-21 references 7 worklog category files that don't exist — either create the 7 partitions with template headers, or rewrite the taxonomy to use a single `worklog.md` partitioned by `## CATEGORY` headers. Single sweep PR; ~30 min.

actions_recommended.title: Make vitepress-deploy.yml + ci.yml + mise.toml real: add `docs/.vitepress/config.ts` + `docs/package.json` + populate 6 mise.toml tasks with `run =` lines + populate CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] + populate FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md with status updates + condense or delete SECURITY.md/CODEOWNERS/FUNDING.yml root duplicates
actions_recommended.detail: (a) vitepress-deploy.yml is decorative because `docs/.vitepress/` doesn't exist — add a minimal `docs/.vitepress/config.ts` (VitePress base config) and `docs/package.json` with `vitepress` dep, OR delete the workflow. (b) mise.toml:1-23 has 6 task blocks with no `run` lines — add `run = "cargo test --workspace"` etc (or `echo "no code yet"` for the spec-only repo). CLAUDE.md:32-36's `cargo clippy/fmt/test` commands will then at least dispatch through mise. (c) ci.yml:17-21 test job needs real steps (checkout → setup-node → `npm ci` → `npm test` once vitepress is wired, OR `mise run lint && mise run test`). (d) CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] — add 5 one-liner entries for commits 759112d, 9ad2467, ffe6c6c, 35e7068, 7488fdc under Added/Changed. (e) FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md — mark FR-007 (Worklog routing) as 'In Progress' (docs/worklogs/worklog.md + README.md exist), the other 6 stay Backlog; add `Test Name` placeholders pointing to planned `tests/fr-{001..007}.spec.ts` files. (f) Delete the root `CODEOWNERS`, `SECURITY.md`, `FUNDING.yml` files — keep only the .github/ versions. Single sweep PR; ~45 min.

actions_recommended.title: Delete 9 stale local branches + push the 2 unpushed commits + create 6 planned worklog category files + add missing AGENTS.md-mandated docs/{guides,reports,research,reference,checklists}/ skeletons + add .coderabbit.yaml + add SUPPORT.md + add ISSUE_TEMPLATE/{bug,feature}.yml

(b) `git push origin main` to land 759112d + 9ad2467. (c) Create worklogs/{ARCHITECTURE,DUPLICATION,DEPENDENCIES,INTEGRATION,PERFORMANCE,RESEARCH,GOVERNANCE}.md (one-liner headers + first entry stubs) so the taxonomy in worklog.md:12-21 is satisfied. (d) Add empty `docs/{guides,reports,research,reference,checklists}/.gitkeep` files to satisfy AGENTS.md:47. (e) Add .coderabbit.yaml (or .gemini/review.yaml) so PR review automation is in scope — peer repos use this. (f) Add SUPPORT.md, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml + feature_request.yml to match the org standard. Single sweep PR; ~25 min.

deep_research:
vibeproxy-monitoring-unified is a 'governance-only scaffold' — it documents 7 functional requirements (FR-001 monitoring governance surface, FR-002 dashboard ownership, FR-003 probe semantics, FR-004 alerting guidance, FR-005 metrics normalization, FR-006 validation docs, FR-007 worklog routing) but commits 0 source files, 0 dashboards, 0 alert rules, 0 tests, and 0 Prometheus recording rules. Among 35 tracked files, the entire content tree is `docs/{journeys,operations,worklogs}/` (4 stub files, 1 line each) + governance files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, SPEC.md, CHANGELOG.md, FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, CODEOWNERS, FUNDING.yml, LICENSE, cliff.toml, mise.toml, .pre-commit-config.yaml, .editorconfig, trufflehog.yml, .github/dependabot.yml, .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) + 10 GitHub Actions workflows. The strength of the repo is in (a) the security perimeter — daily Trivy + multi-language CodeQL matrix + dual TruffleHog (secrets-scan.yml + security-deep-scan.yml) + dependabot covering all 3 ecosystems (cargo, gitsubmodule, github-actions) + a strict allowlist:false trufflehog.yml + .pre-commit-config v5 + conventional-pre-commit v4 + a full per-language .editorconfig matrix, comparable to the best in the fleet (KWatch, hwLedger, phenotype-tooling); and (b) the governance taxonomy — AGENTS.md mandates a 7-directory docs/ structure, worklog.md prescribes a 7-category partitioned worklog (ARCHITECTURE/DUPLICATION/DEPENDENCIES/INTEGRATION/PERFORMANCE/RESEARCH/GOVERNANCE), CLAUDE.md mandates AgilePlus tracking + quality checks. The weakness is that almost every prescriptive surface is a hollow shell: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] is empty; FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md has 7/7 FRs in 'Backlog' and 7/7 test-traceability rows in 'Pending'; SPEC.md is 18 lines of bullets; mise.toml declares 6 tasks with no `run` lines; the worklog taxonomy references 7 phantom files; AGENTS.md's mandated `docs/{guides,reports,research,reference,checklists}/` subdirs are missing (only 3/7 exist); and 3 governance files (CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, FUNDING.yml) are duplicated at root and .github/ with conflicting content.

The 10-workflow set has the same r1-r4 hygiene regression pattern seen across the fleet this week: 9/10 pin a placeholder `actions/checkout@df4cb1c069e1874edd31b4311f1884172cec0e10` whose correct SHA (`11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683`) is only present in the comment string — the pin and comment are swapped. Two workflows (ci.yml:25 `KooshaPari/phenotypeActions/.github/workflows/validate-governance.yml@00000000...` and release.yml:41 `KooshaPari/phenotypeActions/promote@00000000...`) call placeholder-SHA reusable workflows that 404; release.yml:26 has a malformed `$123steps.version.outputs.version125` expression; 4 workflows have duplicate top-level keys (`on:` in doc-links.yml:3+:12 and fr-coverage.yml:3+:12, `permissions:` in scorecard.yml:8+:16 and release.yml:9+:17) where YAML merges and the second wins. vitepress-deploy.yml is structurally decorative — it builds `docs/.vitepress/dist` but no `docs/.vitepress/config.ts` and no `docs/package.json` exist, so the Pages artifact is empty. The repo's own `pr-template/bootstrap`, `add-trufflehog-2026-05-02`, `chore/changelog-stub` branch names suggest an active 'stubs everywhere' maintenance posture; PR #38 (open, workflow-hygiene ubuntu-24.04 + permissions) confirms the maintainer is aware. Compared to peer scaffolds (Phenotype-org, FocalPoint, Conft), this repo has a more complete security perimeter (daily Trivy + 3-ecosystem dependabot + strict trufflehog allowlist) but a less complete code surface (0 tests, 0 binaries, 0 e2e) — it is the cleanest 'pure governance' scaffold in the fleet but is still a scaffold. Net hygiene score: 2.0/5 — G1/G2/G4/G5/e2e all DEGRADED, G3 PASS; 4 P0s and 6 P1s concentrated in the workflow-hygiene sweep and the vitepress/mise/ci.yml real-vs-decorative gap; the two highest-leverage actions are (1) the workflow SHA sweep + placeholder-SHA `phenotypeActions` deletion (30 min, 4 P0s closed) and (2) the vitepress/mise/ci.yml/CHANGELOG/FR real-content pass (45 min, 4 more P0s/P1s closed).
